displayName.japanese: ミスティックの救世主

description.brazilian: Você aprendeu sobre a profecia.
description.english: You learned about the prophecy
description.french: Vous avez découvert la prophétie
description.german: Du hast von der Prophezeiung erfahren.
description.italian: Hai scoperto la profezia
description.japanese: 預言について知った
description.spanish: Has conocido la profecía

description.brazilian: Você encontrou a cura.
description.english: You found the cure
description.french: Vous avez découvert le remède
description.german: Du hast das Heilmittel gefunden.
description.italian: Hai trovato la cura
description.japanese: 治療薬を見つけた
description.spanish: Has encontrado la cura

description.brazilian: Você chegou a uma conclusão para o mundo, mas foi a certa?
description.english: You reached a conclusion for the world, but was it the right one?
description.french: Vous avez pris une décision pour le monde... mais est-ce la bonne ?
description.german: Du hast eine Entscheidung für die Zukunft der Welt getroffen, aber war es die richtige?
description.italian: Hai raggiunto un finale per il mondo, ma era quello giusto?
description.japanese: 世界の結論に到達した。だが正しかったのだろうか？
description.polish: Dostarczono światu rozwiązanie… Pomyśl tylko, czy właściwe.
description.russian: Вы дошли до финала. Но точно ли это счастливый конец?
description.schinese: 你为世界做出了抉择，但这抉择正确吗？
description.spanish: Llegaste a una conclusión para el mundo, ¿pero era la correcta?
description.tchinese: 你為世界寫下結局，但這真的是正確的嗎？

description.brazilian: Você manteve a Eyla viva...
description.english: You kept Eyla alive…
description.french: Eyla est en vie, grâce à vous.
description.german: Du hast Eyla am Leben gehalten ...
description.italian: Hai tenuto in vita Eyla...
description.japanese: エイラを生かした…
description.spanish: Mantuviste a Eyla con vida…

description.brazilian: Obtenha todos os patos.
description.english: Obtain all the Ducks
description.french: Récupérez tous les canards
description.german: Finde alle Enten.
description.italian: Hai trovato tutte le Anatre
description.japanese: すべてのアヒルを入手した
description.spanish: Obtén todos los patos

description.brazilian: Você descobriu o segredo dos Tidewalkers.
description.english: You discovered the secret of the Tidewalkers
description.french: Vous avez découvert le secret des Tidewalkers
description.german: Du hast das Geheimnis der Tidewalkers entdeckt.
description.italian: Hai scoperto il segreto dei Tidewalker
description.japanese: タイドウォーカーの秘密を知った
description.schinese: 你发现了\“潮行者\”的秘密
description.spanish: Descubriste el secreto de los Tidewalkers
description.tchinese: 你已發現潮行者的秘密

description.brazilian: Você produziu a Cura sem sacrificar a Matriarca.
description.english: You made the Cure without sacrificing the Matriarch
description.french: Vous avez réussi à créer le remède sans sacrifier la matriarche
description.german: Du hast das Heilmittel hergestellt, ohne die Matriarchin zu opfern.
description.italian: Hai ottenuto la cura senza sacrificare la Matriarca
description.japanese: 雌リーダーを犠牲にすることなく治療薬を作った
description.russian: Вы изготовили лекарство, не принеся в жертву Матриарха
description.schinese: 你没有牺牲族母便制出了解药
description.spanish: Has creado la cura sin sacrificar a la matriarca
description.tchinese: 你在不犧牲族長的情況下製作了解藥

description.brazilian: Você descobriu a verdade sobre a Divindade.
description.english: You discovered the truth about Divinity
description.french: Vous avez découvert la vérité sur Divinité
description.german: Du hast die Wahrheit über Divinitas entdeckt.
description.italian: Hai scoperto la verità sulla Divinità
description.japanese: ディヴィニティの真実を知った
description.spanish: Descubre la verdad sobre el Divinidad
description.tchinese: 你揭開了神聖者的真相

description.brazilian: Você descobriu o Maelstrom.
description.english: You discovered the Maelstrom
description.french: Vous avez découvert le Maelström
description.german: Du hast den Maelstrom entdeckt.
description.italian: Hai scoperto il Maelstrom
description.japanese: メイルストロムを発見した
description.spanish: Descubriste el Maelstrom

displayName.japanese: 美味しいオムレツはいかが？

description.brazilian: Você coletou ao menos 100 ovos de mereid.
description.english: You collected at least 100 mereid eggs
description.french: Vous avez récolté au moins 100 œufs de méréide
description.german: Du hast mindestens 100 Mereiden-Eier gesammelt.
description.italian: Hai raccolto almeno 100 uova di mereide
description.japanese: メレイドの卵を100個以上集めた
description.russian: Вы собрали не менее 100 яиц мереидов
description.schinese: 你收集了100个以上的默鲸卵
description.spanish: Has recolectado al menos 100 huevos de mereid
description.tchinese: 你收集了100顆以上的梅瑞德蛋

description.brazilian: Vença uma corrida.
description.english: Win a race
description.french: Remportez une course
description.german: Gewinne ein Rennen.
description.italian: Vinci una gara
description.japanese: レースに勝利する
description.spanish: Gana una carrera

description.brazilian: Você venceu o duelo no salão.
description.english: You won the duel in the parlor
description.french: Vous avez remporté le duel dans l’amphithéâtre
description.german: Du hast das Duell in der Arena gewonnen.
description.italian: Hai vinto il duello nel salone
description.japanese: アリーナでの決闘に勝った
description.russian: Вы победили в поединке в Зале
description.schinese: 你在大厅的决斗中获胜
description.spanish: Ganaste el duelo en el salón
description.tchinese: 你在會客廳的對戰中獲勝

displayName.spanish: Dejar las diferencias a un lado

description.brazilian: Você conseguiu reunir todas as comunidades no Maelstrom.
description.english: You succeeded in gathering all communities at Maelstrom
description.french: Vous avez réussi à rassembler toutes les communautés au Maelström
description.german: Du hast alle Gemeinschaften beim Maelstrom versammelt.
description.italian: Hai portato tutte le comunità al Maelstrom
description.japanese: メイルストロムにすべての派閥を集めることに成功した
description.russian: Вам удалось собрать все фракции в Мальстрёме
description.schinese: 你成功将所有社群召集前往大漩涡
description.spanish: Lograste reunir a todas las comunidades en Maelstrom
description.tchinese: 你成功在漩渦聚集了所有團體

description.brazilian: Você conheceu o informante.
description.english: You met the mole
description.french: Vous avez rencontré la taupe
description.german: Du hast die Ratte getroffen.
description.italian: Hai incontrato la talpa
description.japanese: スパイに会った
description.spanish: Conociste al topo

description.brazilian: Você tomou ozen pela primeira vez.
description.english: You took ozen for the first time
description.french: Vous avez pris une première dose d’Ozen
description.german: Du hast zum ersten Mal Ozen genommen.
description.italian: Hai preso dell'ozen per la prima volta
description.japanese: 初めてオーゼンを吸った
description.spanish: Has tomado ozen por primera vez

description.brazilian: Siga alguém famoso.
description.english: Follow someone famous
description.french: Suivez une personnalité célèbre
description.german: Folge einer berühmten Person.
description.italian: Segui qualcuno di famoso
description.japanese: 有名人をフォローする
description.spanish: Sigue a alguien famoso

description.brazilian: Mude quem você está seguindo.
description.english: Change who you are following
description.french: Suivez une autre personne
description.german: Ändere, wem du folgst.
description.italian: Cambia chi stai seguendo
description.japanese: フォロー相手を変更する
description.spanish: Cambia a quién estás siguiendo

description.brazilian: Examine mais de 100 documentos escritos.
description.english: Examine more than 100 written documents
description.french: Examinez plus de 100 documents écrits
description.german: Untersuche mehr als 100 Dokumente.
description.italian: Esamina più di 100 documenti scritti
description.japanese: 文書を100以上調べる
description.spanish: Examina más de 100 documentos escritos

displayName.brazilian: O que é meu é seu
displayName.french: Ce qui est à moi est à toi
displayName.german: Was mein ist, ist auch dein
displayName.italian: Ciò che è mio è tuo
displayName.japanese: 俺のものはお前のもの

description.brazilian: Compartilhe ozen em uma caixa de donativos.
description.english: Share ozen in a donation box
description.french: Partagez de l’Ozen dans une boîte à dons
description.german: Lege etwas Ozen in eine Spendenbox.
description.italian: Condividi dell'ozen in una scatola delle donazioni
description.japanese: 募金箱にオーゼンを寄付する
description.polish: Podziel się ozenem w skrzyni na dary.
description.russian: Положить озен в ящик для пожертвований
description.spanish: Comparte ozen en una caja de donaciones

description.brazilian: Deixe 10 gestos.
description.english: Leave 10 emotes
description.french: Laissez 10 émoticônes
description.german: Hinterlasse 10 Emotes.
description.italian: Lascia 10 emote
description.japanese: エモートを10個残す
description.spanish: Deja 10 gestos

displayName.spanish: La basura de uno es el tesoro de otro

description.brazilian: Colete 1.000 sucatas.
description.english: Collect 1000 scraps
description.french: Récupérez 1000 ferraille
description.german: Sammle 1.000 Scrap.
description.italian: Raccogli 1000 parti
description.japanese: スクラップを1000個集める
description.spanish: Recolecta 1.000 de chatarra

description.brazilian: Compre 10 ozen de comerciantes.
description.english: Buy 10 ozen to merchants
description.french: Achetez 10 Ozen à des marchands
description.german: Kaufe 10 Ozen bei Händlern.
description.italian: Compra 10 ozen dai mercanti
description.japanese: 商人からオーゼンを10本買う
description.spanish: Compra 10 ozen a mercaderes

description.brazilian: Conclua todos os eventos do oceano.
description.english: Complete all ocean events
description.french: Terminez tous les événements sur l’océan
description.german: Schließe alle Meer-Events ab.
description.italian: Completa tutti gli eventi oceanici
description.japanese: 海イベントをすべて完了する
description.spanish: Completa todos los eventos oceánicos

description.brazilian: Dê sucata ou ozen a um pedinte.
description.english: Give either scrap or ozen to a beggar
description.french: Donnez de la ferraille ou de l’Ozen à un mendiant
description.german: Gib einem Bettler entweder Schrott oder Ozen.
description.italian: Dai delle parti o dell'ozen a un mendicante
description.japanese: 物乞いにスクラップまたはオーゼンを与える
description.russian: Поделиться с попрошайкой ломом либо озеном
description.spanish: Entrega chatarra u ozen a un mendigo

description.brazilian: Convenceu os Místicos a se juntarem a você.
description.english: You convinced the mystics to join you
description.french: Vous avez convaincu les Mystiques de se joindre à vous
description.german: Du hast die Mystiker überzeugt, sich dir anzuschließen.
description.italian: Hai convinto i Mistici a seguirti
description.japanese: ミスティックを説得して仲間に加えた

description.schinese: 你说服了秘士们加入你
description.spanish: Convenciste a los místicos para que se unieran a ti
description.tchinese: 你已說服秘教徒加入你

description.brazilian: Convenceu os recicladores a se juntarem a você.
description.english: You convinced the reclaimers to join you

description.german: Du hast die Recycler überzeugt, sich dir anzuschließen.
description.italian: Hai convinto i Recuperatori a seguirti
description.japanese: リクレイマーを説得して仲間に加えた
description.russian: Вы убедили Мусорщиков присоединиться к вам
description.schinese: 你说服了拾遗者们加入你
description.spanish: Convenciste a los Recuperadores para que se unieran a ti
description.tchinese: 你已說服回收者加入你

description.brazilian: Convenceu o líder dos saqueadores a apoiar você.
description.english: You convinced the marauder leader to join you
description.french: Vous avez convaincu le chef des Maraudeurs de se joindre à vous
description.german: Du hast den Anführer der Plünderer überzeugt, sich dir anzuschließen.

description.japanese: マローダーのリーダーを説得して仲間に加えた
description.russian: Вы убедили лидера Мародёров присоединиться к вам
description.schinese: 你说服了掠夺者的首领加入你
description.spanish: Convenciste al líder merodeador para que se uniera a ti
description.tchinese: 你已說服掠劫者首領加入你

description.brazilian: Convenceu o Efol a ajudar você.
description.english: You convinced Efod to help you
description.french: Vous avez convaincu Efod de vous aider
description.german: Du hast Efod überzeugt, dir zu helfen.
description.italian: Hai convinto Efod ad aiutarti
description.japanese: エフォドを説得して協力してもらった
description.schinese: 你说服了伊佛德帮助你
description.spanish: Convenciste a Efod para que te ayudara
description.tchinese: 你已說服埃佛德幫助你

displayName.brazilian: Amigo do meu amigo é meu amigo

description.brazilian: Você fez todos colaborarem pelo destino do mundo.
description.english: You made everyone collaborate for the world's destiny
description.french: Vous avez encouragé toutes les factions à collaborer pour le destin du monde
description.german: Du hast alle dazu gebracht, für die Zukunft der Welt zusammenzuarbeiten.
description.italian: Hai fatto in modo che tutti collaborassero per il destino del mondo
description.japanese: 世界の運命のために、全員を協力させた
description.polish: Nakłoniono wszystkich do współpracy w imię losu świata.
description.russian: Вы убедили всех поработать сообща на благо мира
description.schinese: 你成功让所有人为世界的命运而协作
description.spanish: Lograste que todos colaboraran por el destino del mundo
description.tchinese: 你讓所有人為世界的命運合作
